title: House of Lies
overview: The contestants arrive at a cliffside mansion and a $250,000 prize is shared equally. To win, they must simply trust each other — but schemes soon arise.

title: Why Is Everyone Being so Frickin' Emotional?
overview: After the turbulent events of the first Trust Ceremony, the group opens up but truths and lies intertwine. A ranking test turns a player into a target.

title: And That Changes Everything...
overview: A contestant seeks to make amends and is given the opportunity to clear the air. A solid alliance wavers as a player threatens to vote someone out.

title: My Integrity Can't Be Bought
overview: An enticing Trust Ceremony offers players the chance to boost their shares. At a fancy dinner party, a huge secret and an unexpected offer emerge.

title: Selfishness Is NOT Black & White
overview: Thousands of dollars are on the line for one player who gets a tempting proposition ahead of the next vote. A test based on lies puts the group on edge.

title: Snake in the Grass
overview: A contestant desperately tries to avoid elimination while another's true loyalties come into question. The Vault makes an unprecedented offer.

title: The Snake Is Slithering
overview: With one player out and another feeling isolated, betrayal breeds bombshells in the mansion and cracks in seemingly strong alliances begin to show.

title: The End of the Rainbow
overview: As the final Trust Ceremony nears, a shocking truth is revealed and a huge offer is presented. In the end, who will win the cash and how much will it be?
